posts.title: "@astro-minimax/ai Module Technical Architecture Deep Dive"
posts.summary: The article explains the vendor-agnostic architecture of the @astro-minimax/ai module, detailing its layered RAG pipeline, multi-provider failover, build-runtime separation, and graceful degradation to deliver low-latency, resilient blog AI interactions.

posts.title: Settings Panel & Preferences
posts.summary: The article introduces astro-minimax’s settings panel, explaining how to adjust appearance, reading, layout, and general preferences, then save, share, reset, and automatically restore them for a personalized blog experience.

posts.title: "@astro-minimax/ai 模块技术架构详解"
posts.summary: 文章详解 @astro-minimax/ai 的分层技术架构，围绕 RAG 流水线、多供应商抽象、流式响应与降级容错设计展开，说明其如何在博客场景中实现低延迟、高可用且可扩展的 AI 交互能力。

posts.title: 设置面板与偏好设置
posts.summary: 文章介绍 astro-minimax 的设置面板使用方式，说明外观、阅读、布局与通用偏好的配置项，以及通过 localStorage 持久化和 URL 参数分享设置的实现效果。

posts.title: How to update dependencies of astro-minimax
posts.summary: The article explains how to update astro-minimax dependencies and template safely using pnpm, npm-check-updates, and Git workflows, helping users stay current while reducing breakage risk.

posts.title: 如何更新 astro-minimax 的依赖
posts.summary: 文章介绍更新 astro-minimax 依赖与模板的实用流程：CLI 用户可直接用 pnpm 更新，模板用户可借助 npm-check-updates 分层升级并用 Git 合并模板，从而更稳妥地保持项目最新。

posts.title: "Configuring Environment Variables in Cloudflare Pages"
posts.summary: This tutorial shows how to configure Cloudflare Pages environment variables for astro-minimax, including build-time and runtime settings, scope selection, and AI binding alignment, so deployment, AI chat, notifications, and builds work correctly.

posts.title: "Complete Setup Guide: From Zero to Production"
posts.summary: The article provides a step-by-step tutorial for creating an astro-minimax blog, configuring core features, and deploying it to Cloudflare and Vercel to enable comments, analytics, notifications, and AI chat for a production-ready setup.

posts.title: "Setup Umami Analytics: Free Vercel Deployment"
posts.summary: This tutorial explains how to deploy the privacy-friendly Umami analytics platform for free with Vercel and Neon, compares alternative hosting options, and outlines setup, initialization, and blog integration preparation via websiteId retrieval.

posts.title: "Deploy Waline Comment System on Vercel"
posts.summary: The article explains how to deploy Waline on Vercel with a built-in Neon PostgreSQL database, configure required environment variables and optional email notifications, then connect it to an astro-minimax blog for a complete comment system.

posts.title: "Cloudflare Pages 环境变量配置指南"
posts.summary: 本文围绕 astro-minimax 在 Cloudflare Pages 部署时的环境变量配置，说明构建时与运行时变量的设置方法、必需与可选项及排障要点，以确保 AI、通知和站点功能正常启用。

posts.title: "从零开始：完整博客搭建指南"
posts.summary: 文章围绕 astro-minimax 博客，从项目初始化、站点配置到 Cloudflare 部署，并接入 Waline、Umami、Telegram 通知与 AI 聊天，帮助读者完成一套可用的完整博客系统。

posts.title: "配置 Umami 网站统计：Vercel 免费部署方案"
posts.summary: 文章介绍了基于 Vercel 与 Neon PostgreSQL 免费部署 Umami 的完整流程，并说明如何获取网站追踪参数集成到博客中，以实现隐私友好且低运维的网站统计。

posts.title: "在 Vercel 部署 Waline 评论系统"
posts.summary: 本文介绍在 Vercel 部署 Waline 评论系统的方法，包括创建 Neon PostgreSQL、导入表结构、配置环境变量与邮件/Webhook，并集成到 astro-minimax 博客以实现评论与通知能力。

posts.title: "2026 Tech Blog Ecosystem: A Complete Guide to Building Your Own"
posts.summary: The article maps the 2026 tech blog ecosystem across framework, content, search, comments, AI, analytics, notifications, and deployment, then provides decision matrices and stack presets to help readers choose tools that fit their needs and reduce tooling friction.

posts.title: "AI Chat Configuration Guide"
posts.summary: The guide explains how to enable and configure astro-minimax AI chat, set providers and failover, build AI data, and extend or evaluate the system to achieve reliable, secure, tool-enabled responses.

posts.title: "CLI Tools Guide"
posts.summary: This guide explains how to use the @astro-minimax/cli toolkit to initialize blog projects, manage posts, run AI content workflows, and maintain profile and data files for more efficient blog operations.

posts.title: "Blog Notification System Configuration Guide"
posts.summary: This guide explains how to configure astro-minimax’s multi-channel notification system via environment variables, custom templates, and Waline webhooks to deliver real-time comment and AI chat alerts with fault-tolerant parallel sending.

posts.title: "Why astro-minimax: Design Decisions & Technical Philosophy"
posts.summary: The article explains astro-minimax’s design philosophy by detailing its Astro-based architecture, monorepo package split, virtual-module configuration, and built-in RAG search/chat choices, concluding that this approach balances fast setup, extensibility, and low-maintenance operation.

posts.title: "2026 年个人技术博客生态全览：从零构建你的博客系统"
posts.summary: 文章系统梳理2026年个人技术博客从框架、内容管理到AI、搜索与部署的关键选型，并给出按需求决策路径，帮助从零搭建高性能、低成本且可扩展的博客系统。

posts.title: "AI 聊天功能配置指南"
posts.summary: 本文系统讲解 astro-minimax 的 AI 聊天功能配置流程，包括启用开关、Provider 与数据构建、工具调用及评估扩展等设置，帮助站点获得可故障转移、可检索增强且可安全降级的聊天能力。

posts.title: "CLI 工具使用指南"
posts.summary: 本文系统介绍 @astro-minimax/cli 的安装、建站、文章管理、AI 处理、评估与数据维护命令，帮助用户通过统一 CLI 高效完成博客项目初始化、内容生成和质量检查。

posts.title: "博客通知系统配置指南"
posts.summary: 本文介绍 astro-minimax 博客通知系统的配置方法，涵盖 Telegram、Resend 邮件与 Webhook 渠道、Waline 集成、自定义模板和代理设置，帮助站长快速接收评论与 AI 对话通知。

posts.title: "为什么选择 astro-minimax：设计决策与技术思考"
posts.summary: 文章围绕 astro-minimax 的设计决策，阐述其以 Astro、Monorepo 与模块化为核心构建现代技术博客，并通过内置 AI、搜索、通知和 CLI 提升可扩展性与使用效率。

posts.title: "Deployment Guide: Deploy astro-minimax to Multiple Platforms"
posts.summary: This guide covers how to deploy your astro-minimax blog to various platforms. astro-minimax generates static sites, so it can be deployed to almost a…

posts.title: "astro-minimax Feature Overview"
posts.summary: The article introduces the modular astro-minimax Astro blog theme, explaining its content, search, styling, visualization, and optional AI/notification/CLI features, helping users understand configuration options and practical usage paths.

posts.title: "部署指南：多平台部署 astro-minimax"
posts.summary: 文章围绕 astro-minimax 的多平台部署，先区分 Monorepo 与 CLI 两种项目形式，再给出 Cloudflare Pages、Vercel、Netlify、Docker 及静态托管的构建目录、配置项与注意事项，帮助稳定上线并正确启用 AI 功能。

posts.title: "astro-minimax 功能特性总览"
posts.summary: 本文系统梳理 astro-minimax 博客主题的模块化架构、内容管理、搜索、可视化、AI、互动、SEO 与性能等功能，并说明主要配置方式与适用场景，便于快速搭建功能完整的 Astro 博客。

posts.title: "Getting Started: Three Integration Methods"
posts.summary: The article explains three ways to integrate astro-minimax—CLI, GitHub template, and npm packages—showing setup commands, configuration locations, and update paths so users can choose the fastest or most customizable workflow.

posts.title: "快速开始：三种使用方式"
posts.summary: 文章介绍 astro-minimax 的三种快速上手方式：CLI 创建、GitHub Template 与 NPM 包集成，并说明各自适用场景、配置步骤和更新方式，帮助用户按需求高效搭建博客。

posts.title: How to add LaTeX Equations in Astro blog posts
posts.summary: The article explains how to enable LaTeX rendering in Astro Markdown posts by installing math plugins, updating Astro config, importing KaTeX CSS, and adjusting typography so equations display correctly.

posts.title: 如何在 Astro 博客文章中添加 LaTeX 公式
posts.summary: 文章介绍在 Astro 的 astro-minimax 博客中为 Markdown 启用 LaTeX 公式支持的方法，包括安装 remark/rehype/KaTeX 插件、配置样式与语法，最终实现行内和块级公式的正确渲染。

posts.title: How to Use Git Hooks to Auto-Set Post Dates
posts.summary: The article shows how to automate Astro blog post `pubDatetime` and `modDatetime` updates with Git pre-commit hooks, reducing manual date maintenance while preserving any dates already set by the author.

posts.title: 如何使用 Git 钩子自动设置文章日期
posts.summary: 文章介绍在 astro-minimax 博客中通过 Git pre-commit 钩子自动填充 frontmatter 的发布日期与修改日期，并用 CLI 或 Husky 手动配置实现免手动维护且保留人工设定值。

posts.title: Dynamic OG image generation in astro-minimax blog posts
posts.summary: The article explains how astro-minimax generates dynamic OG images at build time, how `cover` and `ogImage` fall back to each other, and why this improves social sharing while increasing build time.

posts.title: 在 astro-minimax 中动态生成 OG 图片
posts.summary: 文章介绍 astro-minimax 在构建时为未设置 ogImage 的非草稿文章动态生成社交分享图的方法，说明 cover 与 ogImage 的回退规则、字体配置及构建耗时权衡。

posts.title: Adding new posts in astro-minimax theme
posts.summary: This tutorial explains how to create and organize new posts in the astro-minimax theme, configure frontmatter and slugs correctly, and avoid URL or build issues for better content management and SEO.

posts.title: 在 astro-minimax 主题中添加新文章
posts.summary: 本文介绍如何在 astro-minimax 主题中创建新文章，包括目录与 URL 规则、Frontmatter 配置、代码高亮和图片存储方式，以便规范发布并优化管理与展示。

posts.title: How to configure astro-minimax theme
posts.summary: The article explains how to customize the astro-minimax Astro blog theme through config files, covering site settings, feature toggles, navigation, projects, branding, social/share links, and optional integrations to tailor behavior and UI.

posts.title: 如何配置 astro-minimax 主题
posts.summary: 本文系统说明 astro-minimax 主题的配置方式，围绕 src/config.ts、constants.ts 与样式文件设置站点信息、功能开关、导航、搜索、评论等模块，以实现个性化博客定制。
